CVE-2020-6581.title: Nagios NRPE 3.2.1 has Insufficient Filtering because, for example ...
CVE-2020-6581.summary: Nagios NRPE 3.2.1 has Insufficient Filtering because, for example, nasty_metachars interprets \n as the character \ and the character n (not as the \n newline sequence). This can cause command injection.

CVE-2020-6582.title: Nagios NRPE 3.2.1 has a Heap-Based Buffer Overflow, as demonstrat ...
CVE-2020-6582.summary: Nagios NRPE 3.2.1 has a Heap-Based Buffer Overflow, as demonstrated by interpretation of a small negative number as a large positive number during a bzero call.
